685000000000000000000001 description: You want to meet Tony Volkov? That is not a man you walk up to. He does not trust clean hands, and he does not trust people who still think this place has rules. Bring me something worth his attention, then go to Customs dressed like one of my people. Kill PMCs while wearing scav colors. Show him you can work dirty and walk away alive.
685000000000000000000001 note: Fence wants proof that you can blend in with Scavs and do ugly work without hesitation.
685000000000000000000001 startedMessageT: Go to Customs. Wear the scav kit. Kill PMCs. Survive if you can. Tony will hear about it.
685000000000000000000001 successMessageT: Good. You looked like trash, moved like trash, and still put PMCs in the ground. Tony respects that kind of work. He will speak with you now.
685000000000000000000001 failMessageText: You made noise, but not the kind that opens doors.
685000000000000000000001 completePlayerM: It’s done. Customs is cleaner now.
685000000000000000000001 changeQuestMess: Fence is watching how you handle this.
685000000000000000000011: Hand over 1 Roler Submariner gold wrist watch
685000000000000000000012: Eliminate 8 PMCs on Customs while wearing a Scav vest and Ushanka
